title: National Book Trust Travel Desk Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The National Book Trust (NBT) has officially announced the Travel Desk Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 20 May 2026 at www.nbtindia.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 32 years and hold a Bachelor's degree in any discipline with relevant travel/administration experience can now submit their offline applications from the date of publication to 01 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university with good written and spoken communication skills in English and Hindi, Diploma/Certificate in Travel & Tourism / Hospitality / Office Administration (preferable), Minimum 3-4 years experience in travel desk operations
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Good written and spoken communication skills in English and Hindi. Diploma/Certificate in Travel & Tourism / Hospitality / Office Administration (preferable). Minimum 3-4 years of experience in handling travel desk operations, ticketing, and logistics in a government office / PSU / reputed travel agencies.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for National Book Trust Travel Desk Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the National Book Trust Travel Desk Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the Travel Desk Assistant post is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Travel Desk Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university. A Diploma/Certificate in Travel & Tourism, Hospitality, or Office Administration is preferable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Travel Desk Assistant post is 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Travel Desk Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 24,365/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Travel Desk Assistant post?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You must download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Travel Desk Assistant.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is required for this post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3-4 years of experience in handling travel desk operations, ticketing, and logistics is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
